---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What are you currently unable to do?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like. If possible, include a code example of the desired API:

```ts
// example
await searchService.indexArticle(id, { strategy: "smart" });
```

## Alternatives Considered

Other approaches you've considered and why they don't work as well.

## Additional Context

Any other context, links, or references.
